name: book

mif.reason: Published book prose is a MIF Level-1 output — each chapter's frontmatter carries the chapter's own urn:mif:book: concept identity — but is exempt from the L3 I/O conformance gate because its published FORMAT is orthogonal to the L3 report. The body carries no internal finding identity (citation-leak gate); the canonical L3 source of truth lives in the generic report channel.

description: Author a long-form, multi-chapter book from a research session's surviving findings.
